### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/sigstore (github.com/sigstore/sigstore)</summary>

### [`v1.10.5`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.4...v1.10.5)

#### What's Changed

- (kms/hashivault): add openbao support in [#​2303](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2303)
- Fix typo in RSA PSS 4096 signature identifier in [#​2270](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2270)
- fix: eliminate usage of text/template in [#​2288](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2288)
- chore: mention openbao being supported as well ([#​2303](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/issues/2303)) in [#​2313](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2313)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.4...v1.10.5>

</details>
